name: I'm part time and got hurt at work in Ogden—am I covered?

mainEntity.name: I'm part time and got hurt at work in Ogden—am I covered?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, nearly all Utah employers must cover employees, full or part-time, for job injuries.[1][2] No minimum hours.[1] Key factors: Excludes independents, some farm/domestic; prove employee status. Practical guidance: Report same process; wages based on actual pay. If disputed, show payroll records.
